candidate.title: Broaden data/RAG pipeline coverage beyond vector index mechanics

local_checks.raw_manifest_scan: Targeted rg/find scans of personal-wiki/domains/ai_infra/raw and raw/links found existing local source notes for Milvus, Qdrant, Weaviate, pgvector, FAISS, and inference-runtime sources, plus one incidental Langfuse mention in an unrelated AWS ML blog capture. No existing dedicated raw/links source notes were found for Ray Data, Apache Flink stateful refresh, Hugging Face Text Embeddings Inference, DataHub/OpenLineage metadata lineage, or Langfuse RAG tracing/evaluation. Pre-existing untracked 20260706 compute accelerator captures were observed in git status and excluded.
local_checks.wiki_search: Targeted rg scans of personal-wiki/domains/ai_infra/wiki found Data RAG Vector Infrastructure covering vector databases and index lifecycle, Inference Runtime Infrastructure covering serving runtimes, and NCCL/SGLang observability pages. No curated page existed for data/RAG ingestion pipelines, embedding worker boundaries, re-embedding or refresh workflows, metadata lineage, or production RAG observability beyond vector index mechanics.
local_checks.domain_index_scan: personal-wiki/domains/ai_infra/wiki/index.md indexed Data RAG Vector Infrastructure and Inference Runtime Infrastructure before this task, but did not index a dedicated data/RAG pipeline infrastructure page.

gap_reason: coverage-map.json marked data-rag-vector as partial and explicitly requested Kafka/Flink/object-store ingestion, embedding-generation workers, re-embedding workflows, metadata governance, and production RAG observability beyond vector index mechanics. Existing curated coverage was concentrated in vector database/index mechanics and recent inference-runtime work, so the task required a new source-backed pipeline reference instead of extending vector-index or runtime pages with unrelated facts.

duplicate_policy.excluded_reason: Pre-existing untracked 20260706 compute accelerator crawler captures are hardware-accelerator evidence and were not staged, curated, or used as source evidence for this data/RAG pipeline task.

not_selected_local_paths.reason: Contains an incidental Langfuse string but is an AWS application blog capture, not an official Langfuse RAG observability source.

selected_sources.name: Ray Data pipeline documentation
selected_sources.reason: Primary Ray documentation for distributed ML data loading, object-store examples, transforms, batch inference, and resource-aware workers.

selected_sources.name: Apache Flink stateful stream processing documentation
selected_sources.reason: Primary Flink documentation for stateful streams, event time, durable checkpoints, source-position recovery, and replayable broker inputs.

selected_sources.name: Hugging Face Text Embeddings Inference documentation
selected_sources.reason: Primary embedding-worker evidence for model serving boundaries, batching, queueing, CPU/GPU deployment variants, health, metrics, and OpenAI-compatible embeddings APIs.

selected_sources.name: DataHub metadata ingestion and OpenLineage documentation
selected_sources.reason: Primary metadata and lineage evidence for ingestion recipes, sources/sinks, catalog metadata, jobs, runs, datasets, and lineage facets.

selected_sources.name: Langfuse tracing and evaluation documentation
selected_sources.reason: Primary RAG observability evidence for hierarchical traces, retrieval steps, generations, scores, datasets, experiments, feedback, and OpenTelemetry ingestion.

link_probe_evidence.method: browser retrieval plus sandbox urllib HEAD probe
link_probe_evidence.notes: Official browser/web retrieval was used during curation. Sandbox urllib HEAD probes for the official source URLs failed with Temporary failure in name resolution, so shell-level link evidence is recorded as DNS-blocked in the verification manifest.
